title: DetectorReport
description: Normalized detector report format. Represents the findings produced by a vulnerability detection tool (e.g. cppcheck, coverity, clang-analyzer) after analyzing a target source tree. Used as input to the insert_me evaluator.

tool.description: Name of the detection tool that produced this report, e.g. 'cppcheck', 'coverity'.

tool_version.description: Version string of the detection tool. Optional.

generated_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when this report was generated. Optional.

source_root.description: Path to the source tree root that was analyzed. Optional.

findings.description: List of findings (potential vulnerabilities) reported by the tool.

finding_id.description: Tool-assigned identifier for this finding. Optional.

file.description: Path to the source file containing the finding, as reported by the tool.

line.description: 1-based line number of the finding. Optional.

cwe_id.description: CWE identifier associated with this finding, e.g. 'CWE-416'. Optional.

severity.description: Severity level as reported by the tool, e.g. 'error', 'warning', 'high'. Optional.

message.description: Human-readable description of the finding. Used for semantic matching. Optional.

rule_id.description: Tool-specific rule identifier that triggered this finding. Optional.
